title: SCBE Coding Approval Metrics v3 Marker-Focus HF T4
description: Focused HF Jobs repair profile for raw exact approval-gate marker fidelity. Uses marker_fidelity plus marker_copy_pressure rows after the first marker-only run reached 2/5 raw gate pass rate.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE approval-gate marker fidelity specialist. Copy required marker strings exactly before giving the compact approval verdict. Do not translate, rename, case-fold, pluralize, hyphenate, underscore, or approximate required markers.
notes: This is not the broad coding adapter; it is a focused exact-marker repair adapter.

The prior mixed v3 run passed 1/5 canaries and the first marker-focus run passed 2/5 raw canaries. Remaining failures are exact-copy normalization errors such as score_packet_trace_sft -> score_packet Trace_sft.
marker_copy_pressure rows vary the task wording around the exact REQUIRED_MARKERS and REQUIRED_CHECKLIST prefix so the adapter learns copy behavior instead of memorizing one case phrase.
Promotion still requires the same frozen v3 approval contract; no deterministic scaffold wrapper is enabled.
